name: Process Termination
description: The exit or termination of a running process on a system. This can occur due to normal operations, user-initiated commands, or malicious actions such as process termination by malware to disable security controls.

event_logs.description: Process Termination; captures when a process exits, including process ID and parent process.

sysmon.description: Process Termination; detects when a process exits, including parent-child relationships.

audit_framework.description: Captures process termination via command-line interactions.

low_level_monitoring.description: Monitors low-level system calls related to process termination.

query_tools.description: Can be queried for abnormal exits.

capabilities: Detect malicious termination of security controls.

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: exit_group

log_sources.Channel: Process segfault or abnormal termination after invoking vulnerable syscall sequence
